workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: May 21: got 3×10, last rep on set 3 tough. Push for cleaner reps today — controlled 2-sec eccentric. Hold at 65, next bump is 70.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Holding at 35 per shoulder protocol. Got 12 on set 3 Monday — shoulder trending positive. Next bump is 40 lb (no half-pounds at your gym).

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.detail: 150 lb × 10 · 3 sets (drop to 135 on set 3 if needed)
exercises.note: May 21: got 12 clean at 135 lb. Machine jumps to 150 — time to test it. Attempt 150 for sets 1–2. If set 3 gets ugly, drop to 135.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Elbows high and wide. Pause at peak contraction. Don't rush these — they protect the shoulder.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly (cable)
exercises.note: May 21: 11 lb dual cable, last rep tough. Hold at 11 lb for clean full-range reps. Lead with elbows, not hands.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.detail: Rope pushdown 80 lb × 12 + EZ-Bar curl 45 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: EZ-bar is a fresh stimulus — keep elbows pinned, no swinging. Rope pushdown: full extension at bottom, squeeze.

exercises.name: Core Circuit A
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs × 8/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Hollow Body Hold 25s · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Dead bugs: lower back pressed flat throughout. Hollow body: arms overhead, lower back flat — if hips pop up, reset.
